title: Agent Provider Protocol Failure
objective: Prove OpenClaw contains a provider response that is valid HTTP but invalid provider protocol, ends the turn clearly, and keeps the gateway healthy.

phases.title: Provision Agent Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before wiring the protocol-invalid mock provider.

phases.title: Protocol Failure Turn
phases.intent: Send a simple message that must fail clearly because the provider returns a protocol-invalid success payload.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/expect-command-fails.mjs -- ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-provider-protocol-failure --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 60 --json

phases.title: Post-Failure Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the protocol-invalid provider response.
